calendar.matters:
Petition For Distribution Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Brittany Friend.
Percy Lumpkin (Father of original Beneficiary) also present.

Mr. Vann stated that Sasha was to receive distribution at age 25, that she passed away at age 26, that she never went to college, that Trustee never gave Sasha the money and that the original Trustee is deceased. The Court stated that they can not bypass the Estate and the Trust, that they have to get a personal representative for the Estate and file an 850 Petition, that it has to go through the Estate process and Trust process, and that they need to get a Successor Trustee appointed. The Court denied the Petition for Distribution of Trust Assets, etc. Mr. Vann is to prepare an order.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
